label_verbatim: (Name of Limited Partnership Allowing Indistinguishable Name)
rationale: Top-of-form: the consenting LP's Maine-registered name (domestic-entity convention).

label_verbatim: FIRST: ...consents to the use of the following indistinguishable name
rationale: The specific name being granted for use by the requestor. Same key as MLLC-15 (form-symmetric across LLC/LP variants of the same SOS template).
Name of the entity receiving the right to use the indistinguishable name.

label_verbatim: THIRD: The entity in possession of the name must change its name to
rationale: New (distinguishable) name the consenting LP undertakes to adopt. Form-scoped under name_consent.* (parallel to MLLC-15). Synth copies this into the bundled name-change form (typically LP_MLPA-9) at fill time. Must include a valid LP suffix per §1308.
Signature-row date on left at y=271.

label_verbatim: **By ___ (signature of a general partner) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Shape D — combined name+capacity at y=234, right side. Capacity is constrained by footnote ** to 'a general partner listed in the certificate' (31 MRSA §1324.1.J). The signature line itself has no AcroForm widget (wet-ink only). Single-signer (not multi-signer) — distinct from MLLC-15 which has two parallel slots.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
rationale: Cover-letter row 2 (commonly used when the bundled name-change form is also listed).

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up

rationale: Base fee $35 (per page-0 header) plus expedite premium and any fee from the bundled name-change form.

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
label_verbatim: Contact email address for this filing

widget_id: Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: Email address to use for annual report reminders
rationale: Persistent recurring-reminder email tied to the entity (post-name-change).
